stories.headline: Gunman opens fire near White House, neutralized by Secret Service

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: “Thank you to our great Secret Service and Law Enforcement for the swift and professional action taken this evening against a gunman near the White House…” - President Donald J. Trump

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: The gunman who opened fire near the White House on Saturday afternoon has been identified as 21-year-old Nasire Best of Maryland. Secret Service agents shot Best during the incident, and he later died while being transported to the hospital.

stories.headline: Video of paraglider collision with plane in Austria.
stories.body:
🚨 WATCH: A paraglider gets hit by a Cessna 172 near the Austrian town of Zell am See.

The paraglider was able to pull her rescue parachute and land safely shortly after the incident on Saturday.

According to police, the 44-year-old Austrian had started from Schmittenhöhe in the direction of Piesendorf. Above the Pinzgauer Hütte, she collided at 1:15 p.m. with the Cessna piloted by a 28-year-old.

The pilot of the Cessna, which flew from the Glemm Valley in the direction of Zell am See, was able to land the aircraft safely at Zell am See Airport.

Video: sab_thi

stories.headline: Employers seek nurse practitioners as hottest job in healthcare due to demand and lower costs.
stories.body: Employers are clamoring for workers who can do doctor-like work but who are trained faster and can cost them less.

stories.headline: U.S. pauses $14 billion in arms sales to Taiwan after China summit, raising concerns
stories.body: U.S. arms sales to Taiwan have been “paused,” a senior U.S. military official said, fueling concerns among lawmakers and Taiwanese officials that President Trump’s support for the democratically governed island is wavering.

stories.headline: CEOs prone to AI psychosis due to distance from implementation work.
stories.body:
CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis because they’re sufficiently distant from the last mile of work that still has to happen to generate most value with AI.

So when they play with AI, they see the happy path results, often not considering the next 10 or 20 things that have to happen to get sustainable results from agents. 

“Look I made this awesome product prototype”. Yes but you didn’t have to review the code before it went into production and fix a bunch of issues.

“Look I generated a contract”. Yes but you didn’t verify all the terms before it goes out to the counterparty and didn’t have to wire up all the past contracts to work with.

The best thing you can do as a CEO is to use AI a *ton* to figure out the real implications of agents in the enterprise, and come out the other side with an appreciation for both the upside and the real work that goes into them.

stories.headline: Chemical tank crack prompts large Orange County evacuations
stories.body: A crack has formed in an overheating chemical tank feared to be at risk of exploding, prompting evacuations for around 50,000 people in Orange County, California.

stories.headline: Multiple cracks discovered in GKN Aerospace chemical tank
stories.body: In an update on Sunday evening, Orange County Fire Authority officials said they have discovered multiple cracks in an unstable chemical tank at GKN Aerospace, not just one. AIR7 video shows firefighters climbing a ladder up to the top of the tanks.

stories.headline: Newsom requests federal emergency declaration for Orange County
stories.body: California has mobilized over 785+ state and local first responders — including hazardous materials experts working around the clock — to support Orange County communities impacted by the chemical incident in Garden Grove. To further support this 24/7 work, we’ve requested that President Trump approve an emergency declaration to unlock additional federal support.
